description: Carries only absolute or same-document OBI-defined references: every sources[*].location is an absolute URI or a format-defined absolute address (never a relative reference); every schema $ref is a same-document fragment or an absolute URI; every schema $id is absolute; every named-transform $ref in bindings[*].inputTransform/outputTransform is a same-document fragment. URI-form references are well-formed per RFC 3986 §4.1; a format-defined absolute address (e.g. a gRPC host:port) is well-formed per its own format and is exempt. bindings[*].ref is interpreted by the binding format and is out of scope for this rule.
notes: Format-defined absolute addresses (e.g. a gRPC host:port) are exempt from RFC 3986 URI well-formedness; their validity is per-format and cannot be checked by a format-agnostic validator, so positive cases for them are not fixtured here (same per-format testability limitation as OBI-D-13 and OBI-T-06). The relative-reference and malformed-URI negatives below apply to the URI-form branch.

tests.description: relative URI reference in source location
absolute URI containing disallowed angle-bracket characters in source location
URI containing a backtick in schema $ref
